situational_context: Running comeback week 7 (10 runs completed since May 3, 46 days in). Run #11 skipped June 17 despite adequate readiness — likely baby/appointment conflict (Rdv Léonie ipso santé 17:20); normal for new-parent context. ACWR improved to 1.32 (from 1.35 on June 14) but still above 1.3 upper bound — needs 1-2 more low-load days to normalise. HRV 7d avg stable at 35 ms (target >=37 not yet met; trend flat since early June). Body battery recovering well: 53 today, best in a week. Extreme heat wave in Paris (37C forecast June 19-21, easing to 31-33C June 22-24) limits outdoor sessions — all training needs heat-adjusted HR caps and hydration. Weight stable at 102.6 kg, gradual downtrend intact (-1.2 kg over 4 weeks). E-bike commuting remains primary volume driver. No new labs; Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

recommendations.text: ACWR still 1.32 (above 1.3) — continue load management. Rest today and Friday. The skipped Run #11 actually helps ACWR normalisation. Resume structured training Saturday with Run #12 (heat-adjusted 4 km Z2). If today's sur site commute is gravel (suffer >25), downgrade Saturday's run to 3 km or walk.
recommendations.measurable: ACWR <= 1.3 by Saturday June 20; no additional load today or Friday

recommendations.text: Extreme heat wave (37C through Sunday) — all outdoor sessions require: HR cap reduced by 10 bpm (125 max for runs, 120 for cycling), >=500 mL water carried, shaded routes (Bois de Vincennes), abort if HR cannot come down despite walking or if lightheaded. Plan sessions at 11:30 (before peak heat at 14:00-16:00).
recommendations.measurable: Zero heat incidents; all sessions completed or safely aborted by HR/perceived exertion criteria

recommendations.text: Protein intake significantly below target (avg ~114g/day vs 150g target this week). At 102.6 kg during running comeback, adequate protein (1.4-1.6 g/kg = 144-164g/day) supports tendon adaptation and preserves lean mass during caloric deficit. Add 30-40g protein per day via simple additions (Greek yogurt, whey shake, extra meat portion).

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if ACWR remains > 1.3 past June 20 despite rest days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 1.32; improving but still elevated. Should normalise with 2 rest days (Thu-Fri).

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 32 ms or fails to trend toward 37 ms over next 7 days
markers_to_watch.reason: Stable at 35 for 2 weeks; recovery toward May baseline (37-38) has stalled.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localised joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after Run #12 triggers skip of Run #13
markers_to_watch.reason: 6 days between runs (Jun 14 → Jun 20); tissue re-adaptation after gap needs monitoring.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any symptoms of heat illness (nausea, confusion, cessation of sweating) = immediate stop + shade + hydration
markers_to_watch.reason: 37C canicule conditions; 102.6 kg body mass increases thermal load.
